mnemonics: Smart People Verify All Transactions Very Carefully
keyPoints: Ethereum is a decentralized state machine managed by a global P2P network.
The EVM (Ethereum Virtual Machine) is the core processing unit that executes smart contract code.
Gas is the unit that measures the computational effort required to execute operations, paid for in ETH.
commonMistakes: Confusing Ether (ETH) with Gas (the fee for computation).
Assuming all data stored on-chain is cheap; storing large amounts of data is extremely expensive.
Thinking transactions are only for transferring value; they primarily execute code and change contract state.
